title: Extraction Method D (PRP and RM)
author: Faezah Mohd Salleh
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.indcda6

steps.title: Digestion of ca
steps.instruction: Digestion of ca. 50 mg sample with Buffer ATL (Qiagen, Hilden, DE) and Proteinase K overnight at 56 °C. undetermined, Buffer ATL Incubation was performed with rotation of the samples in an oven.

steps.title: After pelleting remaining material, remove the...
steps.instruction: After pelleting remaining material, remove the supernatant and add to Buffer AL and ethanol.

steps.title: Transfer the solution to DNeasy Mini...
steps.instruction: Transfer the solution to DNeasy Mini spin column (Qiagen, Hilden, DE)

steps.title: DNA purification following manufacturer's protocol with...
steps.instruction: DNA purification following manufacturer's protocol with Buffer AW1 and Buffer AW2 (Qiagen, Hilden, DE).

steps.title: Prior to elution, incubate DNA in...
steps.instruction: Prior to elution, incubate DNA in the membrane with elution Buffer AE for 20 min at 37 °C. 00:20:00, Incubation at 37 °C

steps.title: Proceed elution by centrifugation at 8000 rpm for 1 min
steps.instruction: Proceed elution by centrifugation at 8000 rpm for 1 min. 00:01:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Prior to library construction, analyze small...
steps.instruction: Prior to library construction, analyze small aliquots of each extract on Nanodrop (Thermo Fischer Scientific, Darmstadt, DE) for estimation of DNA concentration.
